title: StatisticsSchemas
description: JSON schemas for bioRxiv statistics endpoints

SummaryStatisticsEntry.title: SummaryStatisticsEntry
SummaryStatisticsEntry.description: Content summary statistics for a single time period

month.description: Month (YYYY-MM) or year (YYYY) of the statistics

new_papers.description: Number of new papers posted in the period

revised_papers.description: Number of revised papers posted in the period

new_papers_cumulative.description: Cumulative total of new papers through this period

revised_papers_cumulative.description: Cumulative total of revised papers through this period

all_papers_cumulative.description: Cumulative total of all papers through this period

UsageStatisticsEntry.title: UsageStatisticsEntry
UsageStatisticsEntry.description: Usage statistics for a single time period

month.description: Month (YYYY-MM) or year (YYYY) of the statistics

abstract_views.description: Number of abstract page views in the period

full_text_views.description: Number of full-text HTML views in the period

pdf_downloads.description: Number of PDF downloads in the period

abstract_views_cumulative.description: Cumulative abstract views through this period

full_text_views_cumulative.description: Cumulative full-text views through this period

pdf_downloads_cumulative.description: Cumulative PDF downloads through this period

ResponseMessage.title: ResponseMessage
ResponseMessage.description: Status message included with API responses

count.description: Number of results in this response
